listitem.para: * resulols = a results tlist from a first stage estimation
* n1 = # of observations of the sub-period
- resulch('rols') = the tlist results from first stage estimation
- resulch('fstat') = value of the test statistic
- resulch('cut') = date (if there is a ts in the regression) or index of the observation (if there is no ts in the regression) of the break

refentry.refsection: DESCRIPTION Computes in-sample Chow predictive failure test. Results are stored in a tlist and displayed on screen if the user has not given as second argument 'noprint'.

refsection.title: EXAMPLE
